betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The Charger converts uncharged Certus Quartz Crystals into Charged Certus Quartz Crystals using AE power from the network.

It accepts AE/t power and processes one crystal at a time. It also charges other items like Entropy Manipulator and Wireless Terminals.

Craft the Charger with:
2× Fluix Crystal
1× Charged Certus Quartz Crystal
2× Iron Ingot
1× Glass Cable

Tip: Place multiple Chargers for faster crystal processing. Connect to your power backbone early.
